---
id: organizations-revoke
title: "Revoke a user's access to an organization"
description: "Remove permission of a user to access an organization you have write access to."
sidebar_label: "Revoke a user's access to an organization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api/hook-0-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Revoke a user's access to an organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/organizations/{organization_id}/invite"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Remove permission of a user to access an organization you have write access to.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"organization_id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"style":"simple"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"user_id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"}},"required":["user_id"],"title":"Revoke"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}

>
